name: @repo-orchestrator/setup
description: Interactive setup runner for repo-orchestrator — prerequisite check, component install, workspace bootstrap

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
